However, in the event of any conflict be tween the requirements of the equivalent codes and standards, and the requirements of the Indian standards/ regulations, the latter shall govern, unless, specified otherwise in the specification. vi) It shall be responsibility of the Contractor to obtain the necessary approvals of Inspection Authority/ Chief Inspector of Boilers on behalf of the purchaser, as may be required for designing and design calculations, manufacturing and erection procedure, testing etc. as called for under the IBR. All such documentation submitted to statutory authorities shall also be submitted to the purchaser for his review. It shall also be the responsibility of the Contractor to furnish the requisite documentation as required by the purchaser for getting the boiler registered under IBR. 2.1.5 Steam Generator Rating The Steam Generator shall be designed to cater to duty requirement/ rating specified below: Description Rated parameters i) Steam flow at superheater outlet : 1.02 times the steam flow at turbine at boiler maximum continuous VWO condition plus continuous auxiliary rating (BMCR) steam requirement of unit at TMCR rounded to next integer divisible by 5. ii) Steam temperature : a) At superheater (SH) outlet : To correspond to HP turbine inlet parameters of 537 0 C (indicative value: 540 0 C). b) At re-heater (RH) outlet : To correspond to IP turbine inlet temperature of 565 0 C (indicative value:568 0 C). iii) Feed water temperature at : economizer inlet : To be selected by the bidder based on his optimisation of the turbine cycle. The steam generator shall also be suitable for accepting feed water at lower temperatures corresponding to HP heaters out of service condition without exceeding any of its design limits including design metal temperatures. iv) Steam pressure at superheater outlet : To correspond to turbine throttle steam pressure of 170 kg/cm 2 (abs) [indicative value:179 kg/cm2 (abs)]. v) Steam generator control range : 50% TMCR to 100% BMCR. However, the bidder to specify the feasible mill combinations below 60% TMCR. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 2 (Steam Generator and Auxiliaries) 2 - 3 Note: a) Pressure drop in reheater should not exceed 2.5 kg/cm 2 under all operating conditions. b) The steam temperatures at superheater and reheater outlet(s) shall be guaranteed to be maintained at +5
